account.title: Account details
account.intro: Your GreaseDesk account reference and status.

details.title: Company details
details.intro: Your business's registered details. These appear on quotes and invoices.
details.name: Company name
details.vatRegisteredHint: Off = no VAT on quotes, invoices or overheads (prices are just prices).
details.defaultVatRateHint: The company-wide default. Pre-fills new quotes and overheads; still editable per entry.

invoice.heading: Invoice numbering
invoice.nextNumberHint: Set your starting number before the first invoice is issued.
invoice.nextNumberLocked: Invoices have been issued — the sequence can no longer be changed (numbers must stay gapless).
invoice.warrantyPrefixHint: Warranty / comeback invoices (£0) use their own number series with this prefix.
invoice.emailFooterHint: A small footer line in invoice emails. Never printed on the invoice itself.
invoice.paidWindowHint: Marking an invoice paid holds it for this long before the customer's confirmation is sent — you can quietly unmark it in the window (e.g. a card payment that doesn't clear).
